name: Cookie added without setSecure(true)

patterns.message_template: addCookie called without setSecure(true) in the same method — cookie may be sent over plain HTTP
addCookie called without setSecure(true) in the same method

description: A servlet Cookie is added to the response without a sibling setSecure(true) call in the same method. The cookie will be transmitted over plaintext HTTP, leaking session identifiers to network observers.
remediation: Call cookie.setSecure(true) before response.addCookie(cookie). For Spring's ResponseCookie.builder, use .secure(true).
